# Spit Hierarchy

> Community-driven hip-hop ranking platform where fans vote on rappers, build their own Top 5 lists, debate VS matches, and explore deep artist profiles, discographies, and culture coverage.

Spit Hierarchy combines official editorial rankings with user-generated lists, real-time voting, rapper-versus-rapper matchups, a hip-hop culture blog ("Slick Talk"), polls, quizzes, and member journals. Members earn XP and member status tiers (Bronze through Diamond) through participation.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured rankings, blog carousel, polls, and community highlights.
- [Rappers](/rappers): Browse every rapper profile in the database.
- [Rankings](/rankings): Official editorial rankings and community lists.
- [VS Matches](/vs-matches): Head-to-head rapper matchups with community voting.
- [Slick Talk Blog](/blog): Hip-hop news, interviews, album reviews, and culture coverage.
- [Community Cypher](/community-cypher): Member verses and the hip-hop journal feed.
- [Quiz](/quiz): Hip-hop knowledge quizzes with badges and achievements.
- [Analytics](/analytics): Community voting stats, geographic data, and top rappers by category.
- [About](/about): What Spit Hierarchy is and how the platform works.

## Optional

- [Sign in / Join](/auth): Member sign-up and login.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Use](/terms-of-use)
- [Cookie Policy](/cookie-policy)
